finding: Explorer and Science are now separate but visually aligned. The Science header uses the Explorer structure and theme behavior.
Front-end matrix rendering is fixed; cells have hover percent tooltips but no visible values. SVG heatmap is regenerated with more top padding and grouped ordering.
recommendation: Use the matrix as the canonical structural view.

finding: Graph uses a darker app-style background, valid SVG export, edge-type toggles, zoom buttons, wheel zoom, and pointer pan.
recommendation: Consider defaulting to Similarity-only later if the all-on graph feels too dense.

finding: Distribution plots now use transparent backgrounds and app-aligned colors. Titles and x-label spacing were regenerated to avoid overlap.
recommendation: Keep publication-style white backgrounds for heatmaps; keep transparent backgrounds for simple bar charts.

finding: Export-all was renamed to 'Export all science analyzes'. Individual SVG/CSV downloads exist for graph, matrix, representative sets, gaps, distributions, and cluster sizes.
recommendation: Later add a manifest README inside the ZIP.

finding: Visible gap tabs now match downloadable matrices, including Rendering × Engine.
recommendation: Keep the warning that gaps are model-defined, not product opportunities.

finding: Assumptions are rewritten in relaxed but precise language and include unknown-year policy plus locked v6 weights.
recommendation: Add field-level confidence only after public research release needs are clear.

finding: The graph remains an exploratory map with mixed relation types. Toggles reduce ambiguity but do not eliminate it.
recommendation: Add an edge-type count summary or default view preset in a later phase.
